```{=html}
<div class="post-signature">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 240 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M 10 14 C 50 4, 90 24, 120 14 S 200 4, 230 14" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 10 22 C 50 12, 90 32, 120 22 S 200 12, 230 22" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 10 30 C 50 20, 90 40, 120 30 S 200 20, 230 30" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </svg>
  <span class="sig-name">Gonzalo Llamosas &middot; M&aacute;laga</span>
</div>
```
